title: prevent duplicate/moving a board in a workspace - perrmissions
excerpt:
can you add a workspace permission that we can choose who can duplicate a board in a workspace? we want to prevent users to duplicate boards in a workspace.

posts.author: asiso (alon)
posts.cookedHtml:
can you add a workspace permission that we can choose who can duplicate a board in a workspace? we want to prevent users to duplicate boards in a workspace.

and to prevent a user to move boards between workspaces, as a permission.

thank you!
